series_metadata.series_description: The PPR work flow will produce documents up to and including correspondence (emails, documentation of phone calls, provider-produced records, certified mail), overpayment reports, spreadsheets documenting audit work, internal quality control reviews, and other documents necessary to carry out this process.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until adjudication, then store in designated ODM records center for 7 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office until adjudication, then store in designated ODM records center for 7 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
